overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk nightclub and casino from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring heavy neon lighting in red, purple, and green. The player moves from a narrow corridor into a main gambling floor with roulette tables and slot machines, then through a payment booth area into a hallway with private braindance cabins.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with red neon lighting leading to casino

events.description: approaching the doorway leading from the narrow corridor into the main casino floor

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit narrow corridor with red neon lighting toward the casino entrance

entered.detail: illuminated poster with a stylized face and text reading FREE YOUR FREAK
long horizontal pink neon light fixture on the ceiling
green patterned decorative panel with floral designs
heavy metal door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light. A prominent poster reading FREE YOUR FREAK is visible on the wall ahead, while decorative panels line the sides. The camera moves steadily forward toward a doorway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: casino gaming floor with roulette tables and bar area

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor and entering the open casino floor with purple and pink neon lighting
passing the roulette table and turning slightly toward the bar area

agents.ego_description: walking through the casino floor, observing the gaming tables and bar area while moving past various neon signs

notable_agents.action: female casino dealer standing behind the roulette table wearing a white and black uniform

entered.detail: neon sign with a coyote logo and text EL COYOTE COJO
curved gaming table with green felt surface and digital display
long bar with purple neon underlighting and stools
cursive neon sign reading Bliss in pink lighting
large illuminated fish tank with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious casino floor illuminated by vibrant purple and pink neon lights. A roulette table occupies the center foreground with a dealer standing by, while the EL COYOTE COJO sign glows on the left wall. The camera moves past gaming tables toward a bar area with a Bliss neon sign, passing an aquarium tank on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: payment booth area with slot machines and green neon lighting

events.description: moving from the open casino floor into the payment booth area with distinct green neon lighting
lighting shifts from purple to dominant green neon as approaching the caged pay booth

agents.ego_description: walking past rows of slot machines toward the payment booth at the end of the area

notable_agents.action: patron standing in front of slot machines on the right side

entered.detail: caged booth with metal mesh and bright green neon PAY HERE sign above
row of digital slot machines with glowing screens
red neon sign indicating 18+ age restriction with playing card symbols
white surveillance camera mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a transitional area featuring a bank of slot machines on the left and a prominent PAY HERE booth ahead, enclosed in metal caging with bright green neon lighting. A red 18+ neon sign glows on the right wall as the camera approaches the payment area.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway with private braindance cabins and pink neon lighting

events.description: entering the narrow hallway lined with private braindance cabins
passing by a seated patron on the right side of the hallway

agents.ego_description: walking down the hallway past private cabins with beaded curtains, observing the braindance advertisements

notable_agents.action: patron sitting on a stool using a handheld device, wearing a colorful jacket

entered.detail: private booths with black beaded curtains and blue interior lighting
doorways covered with hanging black beads separating the hallway from private rooms
large illuminated poster advertising braindance cabins with silhouetted figures
dark carpet with hexagonal geometric pattern and neon strip lighting along the edges
continuous pink neon light strips running along the base of the walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow hallway featuring private braindance cabins with beaded curtain doorways on both sides. The lighting shifts to pink neon strips running along the floor and ceiling. Large advertisements for braindance services line the walls, and a patron sits on a stool to the right using a device. The camera continues down the hexagonal-patterned carpet past the private booths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic red corridor into a sprawling neon casino before narrowing again into a private lounge area. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow hall bathed in red light and lined with decorative panels, passing a Free Your Freak poster toward a distant doorway. As the camera emerges from the hall, the space opens into a spacious gambling floor illuminated by vibrant purple and pink neon, gliding past a roulette table and an aquarium toward a bar marked by a Bliss sign. The scene then shifts into a transitional zone where the lighting turns bright green around a caged payment booth and rows of slot machines, before turning away from a red 18+ sign. Finally, the camera enters a narrow hallway with pink neon strips and hexagonal carpeting, moving past beaded curtains and private braindance cabins toward the end of the corridor.
